title: Amtech I9036 9 Piece Extra Long Ball end hex Key Set
features: PERFECT FOR HARD TO REACH AREAS: These extra long ball hex keys increase reach and leverage in hard to reach areas and the ball head design allows you to turn hard to reach fasteners from up to a 30 degree angle
GREATER ACCESS: With a T-handle for greater access, they are supplied with a handy storage holder and extra grip handle
SIZES: The set includes key sizes 1.5mm, 2m, 2.5mm, 3mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm and 10mm
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 9 x EXTRA LONG BALL END HEX KEY SET See more
